backend/main.mo: Minimal Motoko actor with no methods.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping features to impacted files and components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing frontend file purposes across the project.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base styles defining OKLCH color variables for light and dark themes.
frontend/index.html: App entry HTML file with meta tags, fonts, and script loader.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up routing and theme provider for all pages.
Renders an animated gradient divider for section separation.
frontend/src/components/BuildingsCarouse: Carousel component cycling building images with navigation and indicators.
frontend/src/components/FloatingContactB: Floating WhatsApp and contact buttons fixed to screen corner.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer with copyright, social icons, and caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/HeaderNav.tsx: Responsive navigation bar with brand, links, mobile menu, and theme toggle.
frontend/src/components/HeroParallax.tsx: Hero section with parallax-scrolling background image.
frontend/src/components/PageTransition.t: Wraps page content with fade transition on route change.
frontend/src/components/PlotCard.tsx: Displays a property card with image, location, size, and optional price using styled UI elements.
frontend/src/components/ScrollReveal.tsx: Animates child elements into view using IntersectionObserver with optional delay.
frontend/src/components/SiteLayout.tsx: Defines the main site layout with header, footer, routing outlet, page transitions, and floating contact buttons.
frontend/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx: Provides a button to toggle light and dark themes using next-themes after mounting.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor based on Internet Identity, refetching dependent queries on identity change.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides context and helpers for Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity loading.
frontend/src/hooks/usePageMeta.ts: Sets page title and meta description dynamically and restores defaults on unmount.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder file for future React Query hooks.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS setup with custom theme variables for light and dark modes plus animation utilities.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the app with React, wrapping it in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Renders the About page with animations, images, company intro, and page metadata setup.
frontend/src/pages/BuildingsPage.tsx: Shows a buildings portfolio with a carousel, feature grid, descriptions, and page metadata.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Renders the contact page with contact cards, a Google Maps embed, and animated sections using ScrollReveal.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Displays the home page with a hero section, feature highlights, and animated content driven by ScrollReveal and custom components.
frontend/src/pages/PlotsPage.tsx: Shows a list of plot cards with placeholder filter UI, page metadata setup, and scroll-based animations.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending colors, typography, animations, shadows, and plugin setup for project styling.
project_state.json: Holds the project's state, feature metadata, pending requests, and image requirements.
